title: Smoked Lamb Tagine Tacos
description: A Mexican twist on traditional Moroccan flavors, with the rich taste of smoked lamb in a spicy taco.

ingredients.name: Arabian spices
ingredients.notes: Dried, includes cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and turmeric

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until caramelized, about 10 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the smoked lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Arabian spices, cumin, and tomato paste, and stir to combine.
Add the lime juice and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the lamb mixture onto a tortilla, followed by diced avocado, and any other desired toppings.
Note: If you prefer to use a slow cooker, brown the lamb in a skillet, then transfer it to the slow cooker with the remaining ingredients and cook on low for 3-4 hours.
